headline: BlackRock® Canada Announces Risk Rating Changes for certain iShares ETFs and Name Change for iShares Core Canadian Short-Mid Term Universe Bond Index ETF
summary: TORONTO, June 19, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- BlackRock Asset Management Canada Limited (“BlackRock Canada”), an indirect, wholly-owned subsidiary of BlackRock, Inc. (“BlackRock”) (NYSE:BLK), today announced updated investment risk ratings of the iShares ETFs listed below, effective as of June 19, 2026: iShares ETF NameTickerPrevious Risk RatingUpdated Risk RatingiShares India Index ETFXIDMedium to HighMediumiShares 20+ Year U.S. Treasury Bond Index ETF(1)XTLTMedium to HighMediumiShares Global Elec
